task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the CMS Static Block with the correct title, identifier, and status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Magento Admin 'Blocks' grid or the block edit page showing Block Title 'Autumn Collection Featured Products', Identifier 'autumn-collection-featured', and Enable Block set to 'Yes' (Enabled).

task_completion.description: Verify the static block contains the required HTML elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence:
Look at the content editor for the static block. It must contain HTML source code with an

heading, a

paragraph, and a list (

    or
      ) with at least 3 list items (
    1. ) representing product categories.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the CMS Page with the correct title, URL key, and status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Magento Admin 'Pages' grid or the page edit screen showing Page Title 'Autumn Collection 2024', Search Engine Optimization URL Key 'autumn-collection-2024', and Enable Page set to 'Yes' (Enabled).

task_completion.description: Verify the CMS Page has the correct layout and meta title configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the CMS Page edit screen. Under the 'Design' section, Layout should be '1 column'. Under the 'Search Engine Optimization' section, Meta Title should be 'Autumn Collection 2024 | NestWell Home'.

task_completion.description: Verify the CMS Page embeds the static block using the correct directive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the content editor for the CMS Page. The text must contain the exact directive: {{block id="autumn-collection-featured"}}.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Magento Admin web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Magento Admin panel (http://localhost/admin), rather than terminal windows executing API requests or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of MySQL CLI, phpMyAdmin, or similar database tools being used to insert the CMS block or page records directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually typed or pasted the content into the Magento forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Magento form fields (e.g., typing in the WYSIWYG editor or HTML source view) rather than just showing a local text editor with the answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Block Title: 'Autumn Collection Featured Products'
Block Identifier: 'autumn-collection-featured'
Page Title: 'Autumn Collection 2024'
Page URL Key: 'autumn-collection-2024'
Page Meta Title: 'Autumn Collection 2024 | NestWell Home'
Block Directive: '{{block id="autumn-collection-featured"}}'
Page Meta Description (if visible) should reference 'Autumn 2024'.
